title: The Eye Drops Countdown Timer
wikitext:
[]: The Eye Drops Countdown Timer             Quote Post by cd603 » Mon Jul 16, 2012 4:06 am http://soukaika.com/report/report01.html This has me interested. Why does an ad campaign for eye drops need a countdown timer?? Guess we'll find out Tuesday...

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Mon Jul 16, 2012 4:14 am So, there's a bunch of text in this, and as you said, it's probably just for eye drops... but hey I screencapped this picture: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Mon Jul 16, 2012 4:20 am EvangelionFan wrote: Surprised that there's no Mari, especially after she had red eye in 2.xx...

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Jul 16, 2012 6:30 am Oh for the love of... Well as least Asuka will only need to buy half as much as everyone else...

[]: Re: The Eye Drops Countdown Timer             Quote Post by Chrad » Mon Jul 16, 2012 8:40 am cd603 wrote: This has me interested. Why does an ad campaign for eye drops need a countdown timer??

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Jul 20, 2012 9:30 pm Jayfive wrote: Oh for the love of... Well as least Asuka will only need to buy half as much as everyone else...

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Sat Jul 21, 2012 3:06 am Or maybe, eye-drops to hide her red left eye?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Jul 21, 2012 4:18 pm I look forward to seeing how these images will be incorporated into the marketing campaign: Digitally insert some eyedroppers and you're good to go!

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Jul 22, 2012 11:28 pm How much merchandise does 3.0 have under its belt?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jul 24, 2012 12:00 pm Apparently, it's just special packaging for 2 of their products? http://santefx.jp/index.html

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Jul 24, 2012 3:42 pm So we're only getting 2 of the 4 at the start? Lame. And they put silly text on the pics too :( SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Tue Jul 24, 2012 6:19 pm If you go to the forth tab at the top of the front page it goes to a page that suggest there will be three short videos, wonder what they're about??[/spoiler]

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Jul 24, 2012 6:31 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 24, 2012 6:41 pm Monk Ed wrote: That Shinji is one fine young man...

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Tue Jul 24, 2012 7:53 pm Reichu wrote: ...with a peculiarly Eva-like torso.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Jul 25, 2012 12:03 am EvangelionFan wrote: I was about to say, he looks like some kind of slender-Shinji

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Wed Jul 25, 2012 5:02 am He's 14, he's hardly going to be a beefcake.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Jul 31, 2012 6:36 pm http://www.santefx.jp/campaign.html At the bottom. Asuka. Both eyes. Either she isnt with the eyepatch of power for the whole film or they havent thought this campaign through. Clearly Mari isnt a big enough draw.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jul 31, 2012 6:44 pm ^ Asuka obviously doesn't need a patch because the eye drops cured her. Duh!

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Tue Jul 31, 2012 6:54 pm ...
